specific_mechanism: Fungal hyphae from genetically distinct mycelia fuse via anastomosis when compatible, sharing nuclei and resources; vegetative compatibility loci determine fusion success
llm_application: LLM agent merging: when two agents share compatibility signature (e.g., similar fine-tune lineage), enable activation-state anastomosis to share intermediate representations; reject merge under incompatibility.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes lichenology feedback-attenuation mapping as proposed.
